# Pushpam Ayurveda Wellness Centre

Pushpam Ayurveda Wellness Centre is a doctor-led Ayurveda clinic in JP Nagar, Bangalore offering Ayurvedic consultations, Panchakarma and care for chronic pain, disc problems, PCOD, thyroid concerns, skin conditions, digestion, stress, joint pain and preventive wellness.

Primary pages:
- Home: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/index.html
- Treatments: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/treatments.html
- Doctors: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/doctors.html
- Blog: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog.html

High-value treatment guides:
- Ayurvedic Treatment for Disc Bulge and Back Pain: What Actually Helps?: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/ayurvedic-treatment-for-disc-bulge-back-pain.html
- Panchakarma Detox: What It Really Means in Ayurveda: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/panchakarma-detox-meaning-benefits.html
- Ayurveda for PCOD: A Simple Way to Understand Hormonal Imbalance: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/ayurveda-for-pcod-hormonal-imbalance.html
- Thyroid and Ayurveda: Why Energy, Weight and Digestion Matter: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/thyroid-and-ayurveda-simple-guide.html
- Acne, Eczema and Psoriasis: How Ayurveda Reads the Skin: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/ayurvedic-treatment-for-acne-eczema-psoriasis.html
- IBS, Bloating and Acidity: Ayurveda’s Simple Idea of Agni: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/ibs-digestion-agni-ayurveda.html
- Stress, Sleep and Burnout: An Ayurvedic Way to Reset the Nervous System: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/stress-sleep-burnout-ayurveda.html
- Joint Pain and Arthritis: Why Ayurveda Looks at Stiffness, Swelling and Digestion: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/arthritis-joint-pain-ayurveda.html
- Preventive Ayurveda: Why You Should Not Wait Until You Are Sick: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/seasonal-panchakarma-preventive-ayurveda.html
- How to Choose an Ayurveda Hospital or Wellness Centre in Bangalore: https://pushpamayurvedawellness.com/blog/how-to-choose-ayurveda-hospital-bangalore.html

Medical note: Blog content is educational and does not replace a consultation with a qualified physician. Urgent symptoms should be evaluated immediately.
